title: JKBOSE Class 12 Results 2026 - Declared

detail.title: JKBOSE Class 12 Results 2026 - Declared
detail.short_info: JKBOSE 12th Result 2026 : Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Result 2026 has been released on jkbose.jk.gov.in. Here is the direct Link to check your 12th Results Online.

content.text: JKBOSE has officially declared the Class 12 Results 2026 on 22-04-2026. The results belong to the Annual 2026 academic session, and students can check their status online at the Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education exam portal. These results are essential for progression to the next semester and verification of academic performance. Students can access their result by visiting the official Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education website at jkbose.nic.in and entering their registration credentials. It is advised to download and save the result PDF for future academic and official reference.

Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education has published the latest Class 12 results on its official website for the Annual 2026 academic session. Students can log in using their registration credentials and download the provisional results for academic reference and record-keeping.

rows: Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education
Registration Number/Roll Number, Date of Birth

content.text: The university has activated the direct link for checking Class 12 results. Students can instantly view or download their result sheet through the official portal using the link provided below.

sections.heading: How to Check JKBOSE Results 2026 Online?

content.text: Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education has made the result download process simple and quick for students. Candidates only need their registration number and date of birth to view results on the official portal. Here is a step-by-step process you can follow:

items: Visit the Official Website - Go to the official Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education exam portal at jkbose.nic.in.
Find the Results Section - Click on the Examination or Results tab on the homepage.
Select Your Exam - Choose Class 12 Annual Examination from the list of available results.
Enter Your Details - Input your Registration Number and Date of Birth in the required fields.
Submit & View - Click the Submit button to view your Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education result 2026 on screen.
Download the Mark Sheet - Click Download or Print to save your result PDF for official use.
Verify Your Details - Check that your name, roll number, and marks are correctly reflected on the mark sheet.

sections.heading: JKBOSE 12th Result 2026: Search by Roll Number, Name Wise Online at jkbose.jk.gov.in

content.text: How to check by roll number
Follow these steps on the official JK results site:

items: Visit the result portal: jkresults.nic.in.
Click on the link for “JKBOSE 12th Result 2026” or “Higher Secondary Part-II (Class 12th) Annual Regular 2026”.
Enter your roll number exactly as on the admit card.
Click “Submit” / “View Result”.
Your marksheet will appear on the screen; download or print it for reference.

content.text: The online marksheet is provisional; students must collect the original marksheet later from their respective schools.
How to check name-wise result
Name-wise search is available through partner sites like IndiaResults:

items: Go to IndiaResults JKBOSE page: jammu-kashmir.indiaresults.com/jkbose/mindex.html.
Select “JKBOSE 12th Result 2026” (choose your division/zone if asked).
Choose the “Name Wise” option.
Enter your name (or partial name) and search.
Match your entry using father’s name/roll number, then open the result and download it.

content.text: Shiksha and other education portals have also confirmed that the 12th result 2026 and the name-wise list/qualified candidates list have been released.

sections.heading: JKBOSE12th Result 2026 Check By Roll Number Online

content.text: Check by roll number online
To check JKBOSE 12th result 2026 using your roll number:

items: Visit the official result portal: https://jkresults.nic.in or go directly to the Class 12 result page at jkbose.nic.in/results/jkboseresults.aspx.
On the homepage, click on the link “View Result of Higher Secondary Part II (Class 12th) Session Annual Regular 2026”.
A login window will open. Enter your Roll Number and Registration Number in the respective fields.
Type the captcha code as shown on the screen and click “Submit” / “View Result”.
Your JKBOSE 12th marksheet (provisional) will be displayed; download or print it for future use.

content.text: You can also follow a similar flow by visiting jkbose.jk.gov.in and then navigating to “Results” → “Class 12th Results”.

sections.heading: JKBOSE 12th Class Result Search By Name 2026

content.text: JKBOSE has declared the Class 12th Result 2026, and you can check it online using your roll number.
You can check JKBOSE 12th Result 2026 for the Feb-Mar (Summer/Soft Zone) session on the official result portals.

items: JKBOSE main site: jkbose.nic.in
Direct result portal: jkresults.nic.in
Alternate official link: jkbose.jk.gov.in (redirects/result links)

content.text: On these sites, look for the link such as “JKBOSE Class 12th Result 2026” or “JKBOSE 12th Result 2026 (Feb-Mar Session)”.
Use any of these equivalent methods; the process is almost the same on all official portals.
Method 1 - via jkresults.nic.in

items: Open your browser and go to jkresults.nic.in.
On the homepage, click on “JKBOSE 12th Result 2026” / “JKBOSE 2026 Result 12th”.
A login page will open. Enter your Roll Number in the given field.
In many cases you also need to enter your Registration Number for verification.
Type the CAPTCHA code (if shown) correctly.
Click on “Submit” / “View Result”.
Your provisional marksheet will appear on the screen; download or print it for future use.

content.text: Method 2 - via jkbose.nic.in / jkbose.jk.gov.in

items: Visit jkbose.nic.in or jkbose.jk.gov.in in your browser.
Click on the “Results” section or the scrolling link “JKBOSE Class 12th Result 2026 (Feb-Mar Session)”.
Select your division/zone if asked (e.g., Jammu Division Summer Zone / Soft Zone).
Enter your Roll Number and Registration Number.
Complete CAPTCHA and submit.
View, download, and print your marksheet.
